title: chrysosplenium macranthum
intro: Chrysosplenium macranthum, also known as Large Leaf Golden Saxifrage, is a flowering plant species native to East Asia, characterized by its large, rounded leaves and yellow flowers. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Chrysosplenium macranthum are said to include the treatment of fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Chrysosplenium macranthum can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
